settings.text: Formulated from decades of clinical practice on the Sunshine Coast.
Designed for Australia's unique UV, humidity, and coastal conditions.
Protocol-based approach supporting skin function, not just appearance.

settings.label: Aliangé Clinical
settings.headline: Doctor-Developed Skincare Shaped by Coastal Australia.
settings.subheadline: Aliangé Skincare was developed by Dr Alison Jamieson through decades of treating patients on the Sunshine Coast. This region presents unique challenges for skin health — high UV exposure, coastal humidity, salt air, and environmental stressors can accelerate skin aging and barrier damage.

settings.label: The Environment
settings.headline: The Sunshine Coast Skin Environment
settings.body:
Skin on the Sunshine Coast is exposed to conditions rarely seen elsewhere in the world.

Intense Ultraviolet Radiation — Queensland consistently records some of the highest UV indexes globally. Prolonged UV exposure breaks down collagen fibres and increases oxidative stress within the skin.

Coastal Exposure — Salt air and wind can dehydrate the skin barrier while increasing transepidermal water loss.

Heat and Humidity — Humidity can increase oil production while heat accelerates inflammation and barrier disruption.

These environmental conditions require a skincare approach that supports skin function and resilience, not simply cosmetic improvement.

settings.quote_text: Through clinical practice, I observed that many patients experienced persistent pigmentation, dehydration despite humid climates, increased inflammation and redness, and accelerated collagen loss due to sun exposure. Aliangé formulations were developed with these environmental factors in mind.

settings.label: The Protocol
settings.headline: The Aliangé Protocol
settings.body:
Aliangé skincare is designed as a structured protocol rather than individual standalone products. Each step addresses a key aspect of skin physiology:

1. Barrier-supporting cleansing
2. Sebum regulation and microbiome balance
3. Cellular repair and collagen support
4. Protection against environmental stressors

This structured approach reflects the way skin concerns are managed in clinical environments.

settings.title: Barrier-Supporting Cleansing
settings.description: Gentle cleansing that removes impurities without stripping the skin's protective lipid layer.

settings.title: Sebum Regulation
settings.description: Balanced formulations that control excess oil without dehydrating the skin.

settings.title: Cellular Repair
settings.description: Advanced peptides and exosome technology support the skin's natural renewal processes.

settings.title: Collagen Support
settings.description: Clinically studied ingredients that encourage collagen production and maintain firmness.

settings.title: Environmental Protection
settings.description: Antioxidants and SPF defend against the unique UV and coastal stressors of the Sunshine Coast.

settings.title: Microbiome Balance
settings.description: Postbiotic ingredients support a healthy skin microbiome for long-term resilience.

settings.label: A Doctor-Led Philosophy
settings.headline: Skincare Developed for Coastal Australian Conditions

settings.us: Developed through decades of Sunshine Coast clinical practice

settings.question: Why does Sunshine Coast skin need different skincare?
settings.answer: The Sunshine Coast has some of the highest UV indexes in the world, combined with coastal humidity, salt exposure, and heat. These environmental factors accelerate collagen loss, barrier disruption, and pigmentation — requiring skincare that supports skin function rather than just cosmetic appearance.

settings.question: Is Aliangé only suitable for people on the Sunshine Coast?
settings.answer: No. While developed through clinical practice on the Sunshine Coast, Aliangé formulations are designed for anyone exposed to high UV, environmental stress, or who wants a protocol-based approach to skin health. The products work for Australian skin conditions nationwide.

settings.question: What qualifications does Dr Jamieson have?
settings.answer: Dr Alison Jamieson holds an MBBS (Bachelor of Medicine and Surgery), FRACGP (Fellow of the Royal Australian College of General Practitioners), and a Diploma in Dermatology, with more than 40 years of clinical medical experience.

settings.question: What makes a protocol different from regular skincare?
settings.answer: A protocol is a structured sequence of products designed to work together. Each step supports a different biological function of the skin — cleansing, regulation, repair, and protection — mirroring how skin is managed in clinical environments.

settings.question: How long until I see results?
settings.answer: Most people notice improved hydration and comfort within the first few weeks. Structural improvements in collagen support and barrier resilience typically develop over 8–12 weeks of consistent protocol use.

settings.headline: Skincare Developed Through Decades of Coastal Clinical Experience.
settings.subheadline: Discover the Aliangé protocol developed through decades of clinical experience on the Sunshine Coast.
